Unrilled Part To Load - From FB_Position
Drilled Part To Unload - From FB_Position
Unrilled Part To Load - From FB_Position

LineComment.Text: Version | Date | Expert in charge | Changes applied
Reset start when axis in position
Action only true in dedicated steps
Timer between approach and Load/Unload position
